mapper.update: UPDATE t_grade SET student_id = #{studentId},schedule_id = #{scheduleId},grade = #{grade} WHERE grade_id = #{gradeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_course_schedule WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_grade WHERE grade_id = #{gradeId} AND schedule_id IN ( SELECT schedule_id FROM t_course_schedule WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} )
